message.content:
@startuml
participant "users" as user1
participant "users" as user2

participant "首页" as home1
participant "登录" as login1
participant "选择登录身份" as select1

participant "首页" as home2
participant "登录" as login2
participant "选择登录身份" as select2

user1 ..> home1 : 查看所有学生列表
user1 ..> login1 : 登录
user1 ..> select1 : 选择登录身份

alt [如果users是老师]
    user1 ..> login1 : 登录
    login1 ..> select1 : 选择登录身份
    select1 ..> select2 : 选择登录身份
else [如果users是students]
    user1 ..> login1 : 登录
    login1 ..> select2 : 选择登录身份
    select2 ..> select2 : 选择登录身份
end

@enduml
